Home / Alternatives to Retool / Retool vs Budibase

Retool vs Budibase

A side-by-side look at Retool (the paid SaaS) and Budibase (the open source alternative). Use this page to decide if the switch fits your team and workflow.

Retool Budibase
Tagline Build internal admin panels and tools fast. Open source internal tool platform with built-in database.
License Proprietary SaaS GPL-3.0
Pricing Free up to 5 users; Team from $10/user/month + usage. Free to self-host · optional paid hosted plan
Self-host option No Yes — difficulty 2/5
Hosted cloud available Yes (only option) Yes
Desktop apps Varies by product Web only
Mobile apps Official apps typically available None official
Ad slot — between tables

Best for

Bundled database plus internal tool builder in one install.

Budibase strengths

  • Bundled BudibaseDB — no external DB required.
  • Easy self-host via docker-compose.
  • Forms, dashboards and workflows supported.

Budibase weaknesses

  • Pricing for cloud premium features.
  • Smaller component library than Retool.
  • Some external DB connectors still maturing.

What's the catch with Retool?

  • Per-user pricing adds up.
  • Cloud-hosted by default; self-host only on higher tier.
  • Lock-in to Retool's component model.

Still unsure?

Check the full list of alternatives to Retool: see Retool alternatives, or learn more about Budibase on its project page.

Other comparisons

The most Retool-like drag-and-drop builder, fully open source.

Modern UI with git versioning for internal apps.

When you mostly need a spreadsheet UI on top of your database.
